label: Flow A — Ingest & Store
info:
Receives telemetry from bike/+/telemetry and station/+/status.
Writes to 'bike' and 'station' measurements in InfluxDB.

label: Flow B — Fall Detection
info:
Monitors IMU fields in telemetry for sudden acceleration spikes.
Writes 'alert' event to InfluxDB.

label: Flow C — Parking Violation
info:
Detects stationary bikes parked outside authorized zones.
Zones loaded from /data/parking-zones.json.
Writes 'alert' event to InfluxDB.

label: Flow D — Battery & Dock Events
info:
Monitors battery level in telemetry and dock/undock events.
Writes 'alert' event to InfluxDB.

name: Telemetry → bike measurement
Station → station measurement
Detect Fall (|imu_z| > 25)
Detect Unauthorized Parking
Load parking-zones.json
Check Low Battery (< 15%)
